messages.content: When did development begin for Pokemon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire

Development for Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire began in 2012, shortly after the release of Pokémon Black 2 and White 2. The games were officially announced in May 2014 and were released worldwide in November 2014.
When did development begin for Pokemon X and Y
Development for Pokémon X and Y began in 2010, shortly after the release of Pokémon Black and White. The games were officially announced in January 2013 and were released worldwide in October 2013.
When did development begin for Pokemon Black and White

Development for Pokémon Black and White began in 2009, shortly after the release of Pokémon HeartGold and SoulSilver. The games were officially announced in April 2010 and were released in Japan in September 2010, followed by a worldwide release in March 2011.
When did development begin for Pokemon Black 2 and White 2

Development for Pokémon Black 2 and White 2 began in 2011, shortly after the release of Pokémon Black and White. The games were officially announced in February 2012 and were released in Japan in June 2012, followed by a worldwide release in October 2012.
When did development begin for Pokemon Sun and Moon

Development for Pokémon Sun and Moon began in 2014 after the release of Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire. The games were officially announced in February 2016 and were released in November 2016 worldwide.
When did development begin for Pokemon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon
Development for Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon began after the release of Pokémon Sun and Moon in November 2016. The games were officially announced in June 2017 and were released in November 2017.
When did development begin for Pokemon Sword and Shield

Development for Pokémon Sword and Shield began in late 2017, following the release of Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon. The games were officially announced in February 2019 and were released in November 2019.
When did development begin for Pokemon Scarlet and Violet

As of my last update in October 2021, Game Freak has not officially announced any games titled "Pokémon Scarlet and Violet." Therefore, there is no specific information available on when development may have started for those hypothetical titles. Please note that the information provided is based on the latest official announcements available at the time and may have changed since.
When did development begin for Pokemon Diamond and Pearl

Development for Pokémon Diamond and Pearl began in 2004, shortly after the release of Pokémon FireRed and LeafGreen. The games were officially announced in 2006 and were released in Japan in 2006, followed by a worldwide release in 2007.
When did development begin for Pokemon Platinum

Development for Pokemon Platinum began after the release of Pokemon Diamond and Pearl. The game was officially announced in May 2008 and was released in Japan in September 2008, followed by a worldwide release in 2009.
When did development begin for Pokemon HeartGold and SoulSilver

Development for Pokemon HeartGold and SoulSilver began in 2008, shortly after the release of Pokemon Platinum. The games were officially announced in May 2009 and were released in Japan later that year in September 2009, followed by a worldwide release in 2010.
When did development begin for Pokemon Legends Arceus

Development for Pokémon Legends: Arceus began in 2018, shortly after the release of Pokémon Let's Go, Pikachu! and Let's Go, Eevee! The game was officially announced in February 2021 and was released in January 2022.
When did development begin for Pokemon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl

Development for Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl began in 2020, following the release of Pokémon Sword and Shield. The games were officially announced in February 2021 and were released in November 2021.
